summary: Soundboard recording of a solid Europe ’72 show featuring standout Ramble on Rose, Merry Go Round jam and a barn‑burning Railroad Blues.
review: Both reviewers praise this April 1972 European tour performance as a very good, classic Dead set. Highlights mentioned include Ramble on Rose, an energetic Merry Go Round/El Paso tease, a “yummy” Railroad Blues, and Weir’s count‑off into Truckin' that served as a jam gateway. The soundboard source is described as clear enough to showcase the organ work and overall band tightness.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive reviews (5★ and 4★) note strong musical performance and no recording complaints, indicating a good show captured on a clean soundboard.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific audio issues mentioned; reviewers focus on musical aspects, implying a clear and balanced mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Three‑set show with a strong second set; the camera missed the third set but the musical flow—especially the Truckin' count‑off leading into jams—was praised.

band_member_comments.Bob: Weir’s count‑off into Truckin' is highlighted, showing his rhythmic leadership.
band_member_comments.Keys: Good organ work noted on the bottom side of the mix.
